CREATE TABLE test_json (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, js JSON);
INSERT INTO test_json (js) VALUES (json '{"array":[true, false, null]}');
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, json.isvalid(js) AS is_valid FROM test_json;
SELECT id FROM test_results WHERE is_valid = TRUE;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_results WHERE is_valid = FALSE;
SELECT js FROM test_json WHERE json.isvalid(js) = TRUE AND js IS NOT NULL;
SELECT js FROM test_json AS j JOIN test_results AS r ON j.id = r.id WHERE r.is_valid = TRUE;
SELECT js FROM test_json WHERE json.isvalid(js) = TRUE AND js != json '{"empty":{}}';
SELECT js FROM test_json WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_results WHERE is_valid = TRUE);
